result.text:
SpaceX is about to go public. And it's not a normal IPO.

They filed with the SEC. 21 banks on the deal. Morgan Stanley, Goldman, JPMorgan leading it. Roadshow starts June 8. Shares could be trading by late June.

The target valuation? 1.75 trillion. The raise? 75 billion. That would make it the largest IPO in history. Bigger than Saudi Aramco.

Here's the part nobody's talking about. SpaceX is setting aside up to 30% of shares for retail investors. Most IPOs give retail 5 to 10%. This one is different.

Meanwhile they're also building a chip factory in Texas that could cost up to 119 billion. Making chips for SpaceX, xAI, and Tesla all under one roof.

Elon is building an empire. And in about 6 weeks, anyone can own a piece of it.

result.text:
8 May 2026 Giga Texas VIDEO … I got in another drone flight before more rains come through! Today, we see not only the mystery car still under covers, but also new colors Tesla just announced for the Model Y & Model 3s … Marine Blue & Frost Blue! 40+ Cybercabs in the outbound lot along with noticeable jump in production of Model Y’s. 

The supercharger workshop continues to be very busy, assembling all kinds, including the new Folding Unit versions. The SpaceX & Tesla joint venture Advanced Technology Fab construction site continues to see progress on the E site, a new clearing on the far NE field, & the new Optimus factory foundation now getting two types of footings constructed.

Link to 4K video below!

legacy.full_text:
People used to say the Tesla Semi is unreal, that Tesla won’t be able to hit the goals they aim for and blah blah blah.
But today is today.

WattEV just placed a $100 million order for 370 Tesla Semis, the largest single electric truck deployment in California history.

WattEV https://t.co/uXsMMhO6PL

result.text:
People used to say the Tesla Semi is unreal, that Tesla won’t be able to hit the goals they aim for and blah blah blah.
But today is today.

WattEV just placed a $100 million order for 370 Tesla Semis, the largest single electric truck deployment in California history.

WattEV used to be one of Nikola’s biggest electric truck customers. They bought 36 Nikola Tre trucks. They ran them. Then Nikola filed for bankruptcy in February 2025.

WattEV took the lessons, ran a public RFP and chose Tesla.

~ 370 Tesla Semis 
~ $100 million 
~ Largest single electric truck order in California history 
~ 300+ going to the Port of Oakland 
~ Megawatt charging hubs in Oakland, Fresno, Stockton and Sacramento 
~ Full fleet by end of 2027

When the customer with the most direct experience comparing electric trucks in real freight operations picks Tesla, the market has chosen.

result.text:
It's wild that the world's richest man, the CEO of Tesla, has over the last few years:

— been caught emailing Epstein asking to attend his "wildest parties" on his island

— lied about the relationship, claiming he "always refused invites" when emails show he asked to go on at least 3 occasions — after Epstein was already convicted

— facilitated the production and distribution of AI images sexualizing unconsenting adults and minors (part of why France wants to criminally charge him)

— openly echoed white nationalist rhetoric, saying "white people need to reclaim their nations"

— dismantled several government orgs, including those that regulate his many businesses, and some that were directly responsible for saving lives
 
And yet somehow, people continue to support him and invest in his businesses. 

Greed and low morals.

result.text:
Elon is calling French prosecutors "f*gots".

No seriously. Elon loves to take credit for the great things his companies achieve, but he loses his mind the second someone tries to hold him responsible for the bad things his companies do.

He is losing his mind here. He says that french prosecutors are "faker than a chocolate euro" - presumably talking about the currency. And he is making a comeback with his "pedo" name-calling because it went so well last time. 

In French, "pédé" translates directly to calling someone a "pedo" or "pedophile", but in practice, it is used more as a homophobic slur equivalent to "f*got."

Then he says, "Go away or I'll insult you a second time."

No joke, he is losing his mind.
